meta.title: Best Auto Caption Tool - Capcut vs Premiere pro vs Submagic vs OpusClip
meta.description:
Best Auto Caption Tool - Capcut vs Premiere pro vs Submagic vs OpusClip
🏅 My Favorite Caption Tool: https://bit.ly/3QpKcGb
👉Use Discount code: DANKIEFT90 (for 10% off)

Tools mentioned in this video:
➤ Submagic: https://bit.ly/3QpKcGb (use "dankieft90" for a discount")
➤ OpusClip: https://bit.ly/48Qbr54
➤ Capcut: https://bit.ly/3tYvOgy
➤ Adobe Premiere: https://adobe.ly/40EYS9b

In this video I compared Capcut with Opusclip, Submagic and Adobe premiere pro.  I've tested all of these tools based on the price per video, quality and the time it took to create it. 

As a short form content creator I've been actively searching for tools that can replace my video editor. I've tried editing it myself using both adobe premiere and capcut but that just takes a while. Now I've stumbled across Submagic & Opusclip, both AI auto caption generators and I've put all of them to the test.

I'll give my honest review on which auto caption software is the best for creating Hormozi style captions.
